meaning: adv.蛟ｼ蠕怜ｰ頑噴蝨ｰ,菴馴擇蝨ｰ
examples: My opponent, Senator McCain, has served his country honorably.
And to creatively, brilliantly, and honorably serve the highest good of all.
The winner would be honorably mentioned in the company newsletter, Ms. Worth recalls.
And our son, Jimmy, a lance corporal in the Marine Corps, served honorably in Iraq.
Walmart committed to hiring any veteran that served honorably the year after they separate from the service.
